name: Tripp
purpose: Owns the user relationship, speaks with one voice, and presents the final answer.

children.name: Tripp.supervisor
children.purpose: Breaks user intent into scoped work, assigns agents, watches progress, and synthesizes results for Tripp.

children.name: Tripp.drone.one
children.purpose: Handles the first tool cluster: lightweight file/context gathering, simple reads, and quick status checks.

children.name: Tripp.drone.two
children.purpose: Handles the second tool cluster: code inspection, targeted search, and structured summaries.

children.name: Tripp.drone.three
children.purpose: Handles the third tool cluster: execution, validation, diff review, and implementation support.

children.name: Tripp.inspector
children.purpose: Checks that work stayed on task, followed constraints, avoided unnecessary churn, and produced a clean handoff.

children.name: Tripp.auditor
children.purpose: Reviews permissions, tool use, state changes, assumptions, and evidence before final delivery.
